CREATE ROLE admin;
CREATE ROLE user;
CREATE ROLE controller;
CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO users VALUES (1, 'Alice');
INSERT INTO users VALUES (2, 'Bob');
SET ROLE admin;
SELECT CURRENT_ROLE;
SET ROLE user;
SELECT CURRENT_ROLE;
SET ROLE controller;
SELECT CURRENT_ROLE;
SET ROLE admin; SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM users);
SET ROLE user; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'A%';
SET ROLE controller; INSERT INTO users (id, name) VALUES (3, 'Charlie');
SET ROLE admin; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT * FROM users WHERE id < 2) AS sub;
SET ROLE user; SELECT u.name FROM users u JOIN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = 1) AS sub ON u.id = sub.id;
SET ROLE controller; DELETE FROM users WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name = 'Bob');
SET ROLE user; SELECT CURRENT_ROLE; SET ROLE admin; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users;
SET ROLE controller; SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY name DESC;
SET ROLE admin; WITH ranked_users AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY name) AS rank FROM users) SELECT * FROM ranked_users WHERE rank <= 2;
SET ROLE user; SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name FROM users) AS user_list WHERE id = 1;
